kw.name: Setup Admin Session
Login As Admin
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8000/auth/login path_url=/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '68', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username_or_email": "admin01@gmail.com", "password": "Admin@1234"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Authenticates as admin and returns the access token.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=admin_session, url=http://localhost:8000, headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc2ODM4MzE2fQ.gm5ese7k0RNH4vtmocU-jvkZX3qdHsWcTepgWb3gyoA', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Creates an authorized session for admin.

test.name: Admin Can Create User

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{payload} = { username=testuser | title=นาย | first_name=Robot | last_name=Tester | email=testuser@example.com | password=TestPassword123 | role=PROCESSOR | status=ACTIVE }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8000/admin/users path_url=/admin/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc2ODM4MzE2fQ.gm5ese7k0RNH4vtmocU-jvkZX3qdHsWcTepgWb3gyoA', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '206'} body=b'{"username": "testuser", "title": "\\u0e19\\u0e32\\u0e22", "first_name": "Robot", "last_name": "Tester", "email": "testuser@example.com", "password": "TestPassword123", "role": "PROCESSOR", "status": "ACTIVE"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Test creating a new user via Admin API.

test.name: Admin Can List Users

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8000/admin/users path_url=/admin/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc2ODM4MzE2fQ.gm5ese7k0RNH4vtmocU-jvkZX3qdHsWcTepgWb3gyoA', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=None

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://localhost:8000/admin/users/10 path_url=/admin/users/10 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc2ODM4MzE2fQ.gm5ese7k0RNH4vtmocU-jvkZX3qdHsWcTepgWb3gyoA', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '62'} body=b'{"first_name": "Robot-Updated", "last_name": "Tester-Updated"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

test.doc: Test deactivating a user (DELETE method in this API).

test.name: Cleanup Created User From DB
test.doc: Hard delete the user from DB to allow re-running tests.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
